ApiDescription.CodeFlow:
This sample features
  • Branding
  • Conditional recipients
  • Document visibility
  • Embedded signing
Code flow

See the Controller and envelope source code.

Step 1

After the form is submitted, call the AccountBrands:list method on the account to check if the brand you want to create already exists.

If it does, find the corresponding brand ID. If not, call the AccountBrands:create method to create a new brand.

The brand ID is then stored for the next step.
